Title: Order History - View Orders
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User has at least one previous order, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] Wait for orders list to load
[ASSERT] Verify orders list rendered
[ASSERT] Verify orders sorted with most recent first
[ASSERT] Verify each order row shows: order number, date, status, total
[ASSERT] Verify at least one order visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Orders list rendered with at least one row
[DOM] Order number, date, status, total shown per row
[STATE] Orders sorted descending by date (most recent first)
[DOM] Link to order detail available per row
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders returns list with correct fields
[CONSOLE] No errors loading order history
Failure_Signals: Orders list empty when orders exist; orders not sorted correctly
